Thanks for the contribution. Please fill in the sections below and complete the checklist before requesting review.

## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why. Link any related issue.

## Type of change

- [ ] Improvement to existing content
- [ ] New registry target
- [ ] New worked example
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation only

## Checklist
